nasb.text: How then will one answer the messengers of the nation? That the Lord has founded Zion, And the afflicted of His people will seek refuge in it.”

esv.text: What will one answer the messengers of the nation? “The Lord has founded Zion, and in her the afflicted of his people find refuge.”

cnv.text: 人要怎樣回答外族的使者呢？要說： “耶和華建立了錫安， 他子民中的困苦人必在其中避難。”

ccb.text: 该怎样回复外国的使者呢？ 要告诉他们：“耶和华建立了锡安， 祂困苦的子民必得到保护。”

csbs.text: 应当怎样回答外邦的使者们呢？ 当说：“耶和华已奠立了锡安， 他子民中的困苦人必投靠其中。”
